channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Every Surprise Song BTS Has Performed on the ARIRANG World Tour (So Far)
item.description:
[Energetic music plays in the background]
Host: "Hey, ARMY. Are you ready for some exciting news? BTS is back on tour with their ARIRANG World Tour, and they're bringing surprises to the stage every night.
[Short pause for dramatic effect]
Host: "It's been four years since the band's last group performance, and fans have been eagerly waiting. Now, with their new tour, BTS is making sure to satisfy their fans' hunger for music. Their setlist already features 16 songs, plus seven encore tracks, with two surprise songs changing every night.
[Music transitions to a clip of BTS' song]
Host: "The surprise songs are a trip down memory lane, ranging from recent hits like 'Take Two' to older singles like 'I NEED U', and even songs they haven't played in almost a decade, like 'Crystal Snow'. The band has even live-debuted a few tracks, including 'Save ME'.
[Music transitions back to the host]
Host: "Fans are going crazy, trying to keep track of every surprise song the band plays. And we're here to help. Billboard has compiled a list of all the surprise songs so far, and we'll keep updating it as the tour continues.
[Music plays out]
Host: "So, if you're part of the ARMY, get ready for some amazing performances and surprise songs. The ARIRANG World Tour is just getting started, and we can't wait to see what's next. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one."
